CVE-2011-3744.title: HTML Purifier 4.2.0 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive i ...
CVE-2011-3744.summary: HTML Purifier 4.2.0 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via a direct request to a .php file, which reveals the installation path in an error message, as demonstrated by tests/PHPT/Reporter/SimpleTest.php and certain other files.
